summary: Tier 1 Intelligence backend API testing completed successfully - All 20+ Tier 1 Intelligence endpoints tested and verified functional. Key game-changing data endpoints include Executive Dashboard (C-suite view), Automation Pressure Index™ for occupations, First-Mover Windows analysis, Regulatory Timeline forecast 2026-2030, Workforce Impact assessment (8M+ jobs at risk), Automate-Now urgent list, and Hidden Cost Multipliers (budget warnings). All proprietary data endpoints also verified working. Full competitive moat secured with deterministic data APIs.
passed_tests: Tier1 Executive Dashboard - C-suite one-page view with 8,872,000 jobs at risk USA, urgent automations list, closing windows alerts, compliance warnings
Tier1 Automation Pressure Index™ - Signature metric for Data Entry Clerk (92.1/100), Customer Service Rep (85.4/100), Paralegal (75.2/100), Software Developer (55.8/100)
Tier1 First-Mover Windows - 8 automation opportunities ranked by urgency, including 3 closing/narrowing windows (Data Entry, Customer Service AI, Quality Inspection)
Tier1 Regulatory Timeline - Chronological compliance roadmap across 5 jurisdictions (EU, USA-Federal, Canada-Federal, Quebec, UK) with 13 predicted changes 2026-2030
Tier1 Workforce Impact - USA aggregate data showing 8,872,000 jobs at risk, 4 critical skills decay, $94B reskilling market opportunity
Tier1 Automate Now List - 5 urgent automation opportunities (CRITICAL/HIGH urgency) with arbitrage scores >75, labor shortages identified
Tier1 Hidden Cost Multipliers - Budget warning data for 5 automation types, average 1.58x multiplier, HR Resume Screening highest risk at 2.22x
AI Tools Database - 15+ enterprise tools (GPT-5.2, Claude, UiPath, Textract) with pricing models and enterprise readiness flags
Tools Recommendations - Task-to-tool mapping with fit scores and recommended architectures
Automation Blueprint - Complete implementation plans combining tools, complexity, risk analysis, and business case
Custom ROI Calculator - Detailed business case analysis with payback periods and Year 1/3 ROI calculations
Salary Benchmarks - Multi-region fully-loaded cost data for accurate ROI modeling
Task Decomposition - Atomic subtask breakdown with automation potential and time savings analysis
Implementation Complexity - Real-world difficulty assessment with costs, timelines, roles, success rates
Failure Mode Analysis - Comprehensive risk assessment with probabilities, detection methods, mitigation strategies
Database Status - All extended data properly loaded (29 occupations, 39 tasks, 156 automation scores, 17 compliance rules)
Root Endpoint - API documentation and version information verified
success_percentage: backend: 100% (25/25 Tier 1 Intelligence + proprietary endpoint tests passed), frontend: N/A (backend-only testing per review request)
